elements.original_description: A person standing on a pure white background, looking thoughtful with a raised eyebrow, wearing casual clothes in bright colors. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a person standing on a pure white background, looking thoughtful with a raised eyebrow, wearing casual clothes in bright colors. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
